title: Catch Jupiter glowing under the waxing moon on Feb. 26
description: A waxing gibbous moon and brilliant Jupiter will pair up after sunset on Feb. 26.
content: A waxing gibbous moon and brilliant Jupiter will pair up after sunset on Feb. 26.
